prompt: Design a weekly group Bible study rhythm inside Reveal’s community.
method: constitution-bound live-chat simulation (same Nexus packs/contracts/DNA weighting; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)
reply:
Content model: study series → weekly sessions → passages → member notes → schedule timestamps.

Roles: facilitator vs member with authz on creating sessions/prompts. Series/session CRUD on postgres; feed item type links to community home. Reminder job respects quiet notification prefs.

Out of scope this slice: streaks, leaderboards, engagement gamification.
